_comment: GENERATED FILE — DO NOT HAND-EDIT. Run `yarn knowledge-base:index` to regenerate.

topics.title: Accordion
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-accordion component — a vertically stacked header/body component with dedicated expand/collapse controls.

topics.title: Accordion Button
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-accordionbutton component — a vertically stacked component with a fully clickable header and an expandable/collapsible body section.

topics.title: Accordion Group
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-accordiongroup component — a container that manages multiple accordion or accordionbutton components as a unified set.

topics.title: Alert Chip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-alertchip component — an interactive chip used to represent an alert with a leading icon and label.

topics.title: Animation
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-animation component — a wrapper around the Lottie animation library for rendering decorative or labelled animations.

topics.title: Announcement Dialog
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-announcementdialog component — a modal dialog used to display announcements with an illustration, content, and footer actions.

topics.title: App Header
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-appheader component — a structured app header layout with leading, center, and trailing sections.

topics.title: Avatar
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-avatar component — a non-interactive avatar that displays a person or group as a photo, initials, icon, or counter.

topics.title: Avatar Button
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for mdc-avatarbutton — an interactive, focusable avatar wrapped in a button for profile menus, account switchers, and popover triggers.

topics.title: Badge
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-badge component — a small non-interactive indicator used to display a dot, icon, counter, or status (success, warning, error).

topics.title: Banner
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-banner component — an in-page message used to communicate important information that requires user awareness or action to dismiss.

topics.title: Brandvisual
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-brandvisual component — a dynamic loader that renders branded logos and wordmarks from the Momentum brand-visuals package.

topics.title: Bullet
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-bullet component — a small circular visual indicator used to mark or separate list-style content.

topics.title: Button
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-button component — a configurable button that supports pill, pill-with-icon, and icon-only layouts in multiple variants, colors, and sizes.

topics.title: ButtonGroup
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-buttongroup component — a container that groups related buttons into a visually unified, segmented control with shared size and variant.

topics.title: ButtonLink
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-buttonlink component — a link that looks like a button, supporting variant, color, size, and prefix/postfix icons while rendering as an anchor.

topics.title: ButtonSimple
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-buttonsimple component — an unstyled, form-associated button primitive supplying keyboard, focus, disabled, and toggle semantics.

topics.title: Calendar
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-calendar component — a monthly grid for selecting a single date, a week, or a date range with keyboard navigation and locale-aware formatting.

topics.title: Card
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-card component — a static container grouping related information into image, header, body, and footer with link and button slots.

topics.title: Card button
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-cardbutton component — a card-shaped surface that behaves as a single button, so clicking or activating anywhere on the card fires the click event.

topics.title: Card checkbox
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-cardcheckbox component — a card surface that behaves as a single checkbox, toggling on click or Enter/Space.

topics.title: Card radio
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-cardradio component — a card surface behaving as a radio option; only one card per name group can be selected at a time.

topics.title: Checkbox
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-checkbox component — a form control that lets users select one or multiple options, toggle a feature on/off, or indicate agreement.

topics.title: Chip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-chip component — a small interactive button-shaped element representing compact info, an attribute, or a quick action with optional icon and label.

topics.title: Coachmark
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-coachmark component — a contextual onboarding overlay that highlights a UI element with an arrow-anchored bubble to explain its purpose.

topics.title: Combobox
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-combobox component — a text-based dropdown that lets users either type to filter or pick from a predefined list of options.

topics.title: Control type provider
topics.summary: Usage and guidelines for the mdc-controltypeprovider component — a context provider setting whether descendant form controls behave as controlled or uncontrolled.

topics.title: Datepicker
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-datepicker component — a date input offering manual entry or a calendar popover for single, range, or week selection with locale support.

topics.title: Dialog
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-dialog component — a modal overlay with a titled, optionally described surface containing custom body content and footer actions.

topics.title: Divider
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-divider component — a thin horizontal or vertical separator that can optionally host a centered text label or an interactive grabber button.

topics.title: Filterchip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-filterchip component — a togglable chip used to apply or remove a single filter, with a built-in checkmark indicator when selected.

topics.title: Formfieldgroup
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-formfieldgroup component — a labelled container grouping checkbox/toggle form fields with shared header, helper text, and group semantics.

topics.title: Formfieldwrapper
topics.summary: Internal base component that renders the label, helper/validation text, optional toggletip info icon, and required indicator shared by every form field component.

topics.title: Icon
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-icon component — a dynamically loaded SVG icon reading its URL from a parent mdc-iconprovider, supporting decorative and informative roles.

topics.title: Iconprovider
topics.summary: Usage and guidelines for the mdc-iconprovider component — a context provider supplying icon source, file extension, default sizing, and optional caching to every nested mdc-icon.

topics.title: Illustration
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-illustration component — a dynamically loaded SVG illustration reading its URL from a parent mdc-illustrationprovider.

topics.title: Illustrationprovider
topics.summary: Usage and guidelines for the mdc-illustrationprovider component — a context provider supplying illustration source, file extension, and optional caching to every nested mdc-illustration.

topics.title: Input
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-input component — a single-line text input with label, helper/validation text, optional leading icon, prefix text, and clear button.

topics.title: Inputchip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-inputchip component — an interactive chip representing a tokenised input value with a leading prefix, a label, and a close button.

topics.title: Link
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-link component — a navigational hyperlink for in-app routing, external sites, or email/phone handlers, with optional trailing icon.

topics.title: Linkbutton
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-linkbutton component — a control that looks like a hyperlink but behaves as a button, used for in-page actions that should visually read as a link.

topics.title: Linksimple
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-linksimple component — a lightweight, unstyled-by-default hyperlink with no built-in size or icon, suitable for custom child content.

topics.title: List
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-list component — a keyboard-navigable container grouping mdc-listitem elements with an optional header slot and configurable orientation.

topics.title: Listbox
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-listbox component — a single- or multi-select list of mdc-option (optionally grouped by mdc-optgroup) that follows the WAI-ARIA listbox pattern.

topics.title: Listheader
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-listheader component — a non-interactive header row for an mdc-list, with optional prefix and postfix icons and a default slot for actionable elements.

topics.title: Listitem
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-listitem component — a flexible row inside an mdc-list with optional leading/trailing controls, three label slots, and keyboard activation.

topics.title: Marker
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-marker component — a thin vertical visual indicator (solid or striped) used alongside list items, cards, or content blocks to convey status.

topics.title: Menubar
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-menubar component — a vertical container for menu items with keyboard navigation and nested submenu support.

topics.title: Menuitem
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-menuitem component — an actionable item inside a menubar or menu popover with leading/trailing controls and an optional arrow indicator.

topics.title: Menuitemcheckbox
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-menuitemcheckbox component — a checkable menu item with checkbox, checkmark, or toggle indicators.

topics.title: Menuitemradio
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-menuitemradio component — a single-select menu item with radio, checkmark, or no indicator.

topics.title: Menupopover
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-menupopover component — a floating menu overlay for menu items and nested submenus.

topics.title: Menusection
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-menusection component — a labelled grouping of menu items inside a menu or menubar.

topics.title: Navmenuitem
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-navmenuitem component — a navigation-styled menu item with leading icon, optional badge, and tooltip support.

topics.title: Optgroup
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-optgroup component — a labelled grouping of mdc-option elements inside a listbox.

topics.title: Option
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-option component — a selectable option inside a listbox, typically used within mdc-select.

topics.title: Password
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-password component — a password input with a built-in show/hide toggle.

topics.title: Popover
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-popover component — a generic, floating overlay anchored to a trigger element with configurable trigger, placement, focus trap, and dismiss behaviour.

topics.title: Presence
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for mdc-presence — a small status badge that overlays an avatar to show a user's real-time availability or activity state.

topics.title: Progressbar
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-progressbar component — a determinate, linear progress indicator with optional label, percentage readout, and helper/validation text.

topics.title: Progressspinner
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-progressspinner component — a determinate, circular progress indicator with success and error end states.

topics.title: Radio
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-radio component — a single, form-associated radio button with label, optional helper text, custom indicator slot, and keyboard navigation.

topics.title: Radiogroup
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-radiogroup component — a labelled wrapper that groups radios, propagates name and required state, and exposes the group to assistive tech.

topics.title: Responsivesettingsprovider
topics.summary: Usage and guidelines for the mdc-responsivesettingsprovider component — a provider supplying responsive context (media type, popover positioning, fullscreen dialog) to descendants.

topics.title: Screenreaderannouncer
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-screenreaderannouncer component — a non-visual helper pushing messages into a shared aria-live region for assistive tech announcements.

topics.title: Searchfield
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-searchfield component — a single-line search input that supports inline chip filters and keyboard navigation between chips and text.

topics.title: Searchpopover
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-searchpopover component — a searchfield wired to a popover so results or suggestions can appear below with combobox semantics.

topics.title: Select
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-select component — a form-associated dropdown that lets users pick a single value from a predefined list of options.

topics.title: Select List Box
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-selectlistbox component — a light-DOM wrapper that gives `mdc-option` children the correct listbox role inside `mdc-select` and `mdc-combobox`.

topics.title: Side Navigation
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-sidenavigation component — a vertically stacked navigation landmark with expand/collapse behaviour and support for nested menu items.

topics.title: Skeleton
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-skeleton component — a grey placeholder block that signals loading content.

topics.title: Slider
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-slider component — a single-value or range input rendered as one or two thumbs on a track.

topics.title: Spatial Navigation Provider
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-spatialnavigationprovider component — an application-root context provider that moves focus on a 2D plane in response to arrow, Enter, and Escape keys.

topics.title: Spinner
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-spinner component — an indeterminate loading indicator for processes with unknown or variable duration.

topics.title: Static Checkbox
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-staticcheckbox component — a decorative, non-interactive checkbox for read-only or summary views.

topics.title: Static Chip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-staticchip component — a non-interactive chip with a label and optional leading icon, used to display short metadata or status.

topics.title: Static Radio
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-staticradio component — a decorative, non-interactive radio button for read-only or summary views.

topics.title: Static Toggle
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-statictoggle component — a decorative non-interactive toggle switch used to display on/off state visually.

topics.title: Stepper
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-stepper component — the container that orchestrates a sequence of steps and their connectors.

topics.title: Stepper Connector
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-stepperconnector component — the visual line drawn between two stepper items.

topics.title: Stepper Item
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-stepperitem component — a single step inside an mdc-stepper sequence.

topics.title: Tab
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-tab component — an individual tab control used inside mdc-tablist.

topics.title: Tab List
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-tablist component — the container that organizes mdc-tab elements with roving focus and overflow scrolling.

topics.title: Text
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-text component — the typography primitive that renders styled text with a configurable semantic tag.

topics.title: Textarea
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-textarea component — a form-associated multi-line text input with helper text, character limit, and optional keyboard-resizable height.

topics.title: Theme Provider
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-themeprovider component — the context wrapper that applies a Momentum theme class to its subtree.

topics.title: Time Picker
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-timepicker component — a form-associated control for entering or selecting a time in 12-hour or 24-hour format.

topics.title: Toast
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-toast component — a lightweight, non-blocking alert used to inform users about application processes.

topics.title: Toggle
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-toggle component — a form-associated switch for binary on/off settings.

topics.title: Toggletip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-toggletip component — a click-triggered overlay for interactive contextual content.

topics.title: Tooltip
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-tooltip component — a hover/focus-triggered overlay for short, non-interactive hints.

topics.title: Typewriter
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-typewriter component — an animated text component that progressively reveals its content.

topics.title: Verticaltablist
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-verticaltablist component — a vertically oriented tablist for switching between content panels.

topics.title: Virtualizedlist
topics.summary: Usage, guidelines, and accessibility for the mdc-virtualizedlist component — a windowed list that renders only the visible items.
